channel.title: MiHoYo on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in MiHoYo on yexca'Blog

item.title: Honkai: Star Rail Global Server Split Tunneling Rules
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

Split tunneling rules for addressing connection issues from mainland China.

Key

Entering the game requires a UDP connection. Many proxy protocols don’t support UDP and will automatically reject it. To fix this, simply set the UDP connection IPs to direct. Here are the two IPs I captured:

1
2
3

8.209.196.179
# The second one doesn't seem to trigger a direct connection; setting the first one might be enough
47.245.63.117

For security reasons (preventing potential issues caused by inconsistent TCP and UDP routes), I recommend setting all related domains to direct:

item.title: Genshin Impact Auto Check-in (Docker on Linux Server)
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash

Introduction

Since Tencent Cloud Functions started charging in June, I’ve moved my setup to my own server.

Why write this now? Well, my miHoYo BBS cookies expired and needed replacing, so I’m documenting the process for future reference.

Tools & Original Tutorial

Genshin Impact Helper - Yindan’s Blog

The original post covers many methods, which can be a bit cluttered. This post focuses on the specific method I use.

item.title: Genshin Impact Resin Tracking and Notifications
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

While miHoYo’s HoYoLAB provides a way to check Genshin Impact Resin, it’s a bit of a pain to have to reach for your phone and open the app every time you’re working on your PC.

Original post: I made a Resin tracking tool

Download link: Extraction code: 1w5b

After downloading and opening the app, it will prompt you for your UID and Cookie. Here is how to grab your HoYoLAB cookie.
